channel.title: Eng on LRG
channel.description: Recent content in Eng on LRG

item.title: Tweet - 1017158297336664065
item.description:
Don’t worry #eng fans. Perhaps it’ll come home next year…

❤️ 0 | 🔃 0

item.title: Tweet - 1014629310882304000
item.description:
I don’t know a great deal about football, but from what I hear about their manager I hope #ENG win, because it would vindicate the kind of manager that Gareth Southgate appears to be.

Inspiration over fear Team building over dictatorship Kindness over machismo

@GaryLinekertwitter.com

❤️ 0 | 🔃 0

item.title: Tweet - 745007366609965056
item.description:
Loving reading my Twitter feed in reverse chronological order, seeing #ENG fans despair and disappointment turn to fruitless hope.

❤️ 0 | 🔃 0

item.title: Tweet - 17179345054
item.description:
Oh what a surprise #eng have ballsed it up again. We’ll never hear the end of that disallowed goal. Congrats #germany you deserved it

❤️ 0 | 🔃 0
